# International Learn Quran Academy

> International Online Quran Academy offering live, one-on-one Quran classes for kids and adults worldwide — Quran reading with Tajweed, memorization (Hifz), and Arabic with qualified male and female tutors.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Learn Quran online with qualified tutors. Courses, packages, gallery, and free trial registration.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Photos from our online Quran classes and students.

## Optional

- [Login](/auth): Student login to chat with the academy.
